goal: Validate fixture manifest identity and mutation-scope allowlists so benchmark tasks cannot drift from their stable filenames or allow unsafe expected-file paths.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Fixture manifests can silently rename task identity or declare absolute, parent-traversal, or .git expected-file allowlists, weakening eval lineage and mutation-scope enforcement.
